# Tauri Command Contracts: Codebase Cleanup

**Feature**: 012-codebase-cleanup
**Date**: 2026-07-11

---

## Overview

This enabler makes one change to the Tauri command surface: the `greet` command is
removed. All other commands remain unchanged.

---

## Command Removed

### `greet` *(removed)*

**Previous signature**

```
Command: greet
Input:   { name: string }
Output:  string
```

**Reason for removal**: Template scaffolding generated by `tauri init`. The command
was never registered in `src/infrastructure/tauri.ts` and has no call site in the
frontend. It was accidentally left in `invoke_handler!` during initial project setup.

**Impact**: Zero. No frontend code calls this command.

---

## Commands Unchanged

All other registered commands remain identical in signature and behavior.

| Command | Input | Output | Status |
|---------|-------|--------|--------|
| `get_library` | — | `LibraryResponse` | Unchanged |
| `delete_album` | `{ album_id: string }` | `DeleteAlbumResponse` | Unchanged |
| `import_album` | `{ zip_path: string }` | `ImportAlbumResponse` \| `ImportAlbumError` | Unchanged |
| `open_album_viewer` | `OpenAlbumViewerRequest` | `OpenAlbumViewerResponse` \| `ViewerCommandError` | Unchanged |
| `load_album_image` | `LoadAlbumImageRequest` | `LoadAlbumImageResponse` \| `ViewerCommandError` | Unchanged |
| `save_reading_progress` | `SaveReadingProgressRequest` | `SaveReadingProgressResponse` \| `ViewerCommandError` | Unchanged |
| `get_startup_context` | — | `StartupContextResponse` \| `SettingsCommandError` | Unchanged |
| `update_user_settings` | `UpdateUserSettingsRequest` | `UpdateUserSettingsResponse` \| `SettingsCommandError` | Unchanged |
| `set_last_opened_album` | `SetLastOpenedAlbumRequest` | `SetLastOpenedAlbumResponse` \| `SettingsCommandError` | Unchanged |
| `get_album_cover` | `GetAlbumCoverRequest` | `GetAlbumCoverResponse` | Unchanged |
